description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Unittests Core that runs on workflow dispatch, push to any branch except release_doc, and pull requests to the develop branch. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job matrix to test multiple Python versions (3.8 to 3.12). The workflow sets up the OS, extracts the branch name, checks out the core repository, and conditionally checks out the plugins repository. It then sets up Python, installs dependencies, builds requirements, and runs unit tests with pytest for the core.
